steps.title: Rewrite the first equation
steps.content:
The first equation simplifies because subtracting $7$ from both sides leaves
$$x^2+y=0$$
so
$$y=-x^2$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two equations and read the $x$-coordinate of their intersection. Solving $$(x+10)^2=0$$ gives $x=-10$. The answer is -10.
